text: Hello I am your nurse today
How much pain are you feeling
Can you confirm your full name and date of birth
I will explain the wound care procedure before we begin
Do you have diabetes or any medical history that affects healing
Please let me know if the wound dressing feels uncomfortable
I am going to clean the trolley and arrange the sterile materials
Could you tell me if you are allergic to penicillin or latex
Your blood sugar control is important for safe wound healing
I need to verify the cleaning solution with the staff nurse
The sterile dressing packet must remain sealed and intact
